name: Document filing
description: Reads each new document's extracted text, proposes a human-readable title, a folder, and a doctype tag — staged for your approval, never auto-refiled.
prompt: When new documents have extracted text, propose how to file them: a clear human title (replace scanner names like scan_001), the right folder given my existing folders, and a document-type tag. Stage every proposal for my review — never move or rename anything on your own.

vault.why: Reads new documents' extracted text and the existing folder concepts, proposes filing (title + folder + doctype tag), and stages the proposals for review (issue #299 phase 2 — filing never applies itself).
